calendar.matters:
Ntc And Motion For Assignment Of Rights , Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Sep-06-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Robert Perkiss, Esq., for plaintiff and moving party: Discovery Mining, Inc.
Karl Lindinger, defendant in Propria Persona

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Kinry Louie's motion for assignment of rights, restraining and turnover order is granted. No opposition has been filed. Order signed in open court. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Jun-02-2006 Discharged

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Feb-07-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sara Lerschen.
Paul Purdue, Esq. for Plaintiff: Kinry Louis, also present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Karl Lindinger, ind. and dba. as Lindi Inverstments and as Jackson Hewitt Tax Service as follows:
Back Rent $25,412.52
UD damages $8,156.71
Attorney's Fees $2,900.00
Costs $410.50,
Less defendant's security deposit in the amount of $7,000.00, for a total of $29,879.73
Judgment signed in open court.
